sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43613" key="eu)derkh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐδερκής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n43613.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">seeing brightly, bright-eyed</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:151" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">151</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:263" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">263</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
